subcodes.first_line: ...Regarding the education of those two daughters D.  .  .  .  and M.  .  .  .  If thou givest true Bahai education to those two young trees in the garden of Abha
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @role and station of women, @education of children; moral education, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
